arts.ttl: PSG v Aston Villa – how to follow
arts.sum: Fixtures Paris Saint-Germain Vs. Aston Villa - Wed, Apr 9th 2025, 21:00 Aston Villa supporters can follow our eagerly-awaited UEFA Champions League quarter-final against Paris Saint-Germain across the club’s official channels. Unai Emery’s side take on PSG at the Parc des Princes on Wednesday night for a place in the semi-finals of Europe’s elite club competition. Kick-off in the French capital is 8pm (BST) / 9pm (CEST). Kate Tracey, Alan McInally, Ahmed Elmohamady and Lee Hendrie will bring you ‘Matchday Live’ on VillaTV, with the pre-match action getting underway pitchside from the stadium between 6.15-7.15pm. Fans can watch all the claret and blue build-up live for free across VillaTV, X, Facebook and YouTube. Mark Regan and Ian Taylor will then bring you free live audio commentary of the Champions League encounter from 7.45pm on VillaTV and the Villa App (iOS / Google Play). Following the conclusion of the action, our post-match live show will return pitchside 15 minutes after the full-time whistle at the Parc des Princes. We’ll analyse all the crucial action and bring you post-match reaction to what promises to be a memorable night! You can also keep up-to-date and not miss a moment in Paris by following the club’s live ‘Match Centre and Blog’ on our official website and App, as well as in-depth coverage throughout across our social media channels (X, Facebook, Instagram and TikTok). Aston Villa pre and post-match show, audio commentary, build-up, blog, live updates, team news, photos, videos, match report, interviews, reaction, highlights and more - make sure you don’t miss a pass, tackle or goal across the club’s official channels! UTV

arts.ttl: Ronaldinho on Ousmane Dembélé: ‘He has a bit of a Brazilian style.’
arts.sum: There is a certain resemblance between Ousmane Dembélé (27) and Ronaldinho – not only in terms of the clubs that they have played for but also in terms of play…

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery hails Parc des Princes return as "something special" ahead of Champions League tie
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery admits that he is relishing the opportunity to return to face former club Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: “Better than ever” – Aston Villa star thinks he’s best he’s ever been, but can still improve
arts.sum: Aston Villa star Youri Tielemans believes he is currently “better than ever” but can still improve and hit another level at the club. Gazette Van Antwerp have an interview with the midfielder today in which he discusses Aston Villa’s season so far and his own personal development under Unai Emery. The 27-year-old has established himself The post “Better than ever” – Aston Villa star thinks he’s best he’s ever been, but can still improve appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: ‘It will be their choice’ – Désiré Doué evokes potential arrival of French starlets at PSG
arts.sum: The nature of the project at Paris Saint-Germain has shifted significantly over the space of the last two years. No longer a team of big-name superstars, the project is now…

arts.ttl: I've had a funny feeling about Aston Villa and the Champions League since September
arts.sum: Wales manager Craig Bellamy says he has had a 'funny feeling' that Aston Villa are the dark horses in the Champions League - and he has felt as much since way back in September, when Villa's European campaign kicked off. Furthermore, Bellamy can see Villa, Newcastle United and Manchester City breaking the hearts of Nottingham Forest in the Premier League run-in and taking the third, fourth and fifth Champions League positions for next season, behind runaway pair Liverpool and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Gabby Agbonlahor sends Aston Villa warning after violent PSG clashes break out
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa striker Gabby Agbonlahor has sent a'streetwise' warning to those following the Lions in Paris ahead of tonight's Champions League quarter-final tie with PSG at the Parc des Princes, after footage of ugly clashes were publicised on social media. Aston Villa favourite Gabby Agbonlahor has sent a message ahead of the Champions League clash with PSG tonight

arts.ttl: Aston Villa told what's most important as PSG move 'annoying' for Unai Emery
arts.sum: Latest Aston Villa news from BirminghamLive as Unai Emery and Co prepare for Champions League quarter-final clash against Paris Saint-Germain Aston Villa go into tonight’s clash with Paris Saint-Germain having been told that a top-five finish in the Premier League is more important than Champions League glory .

arts.ttl: Where PSG vs Aston Villa in Champions League quarter-final is on TV tonight
arts.sum: Unai Emery's side take on the Ligue 1 champions at the Parc des Princes on Wednesday night, with a semi-final clash against Arsenal or Real Madrid on the cards

arts.ttl: Police launch crackdown after mass brawl between PSG and Aston Villa fans
arts.sum: The build-up to the Champions League quarter-final between PSG and Aston Villa was marred by clashes between the two sets of fans on the streets of Paris on Tuesday
